name: Pork Chops with Bananas and Bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the butter, salt, pepper, and cumin. Rub the mixture onto both sides of the pork chops.
2. Saute the bacon briefly until some of the fat has rendered. Remove from heat and drain on paper towels.
3. Peel the bananas and cut into 1 ¼ inch chunks. Place them on a platter and sprinkle with lemon juice.
4. Slice the bacon into strips long enough to wrap around each banana slice. Thread the slices onto skewers, threading through both the bacon and banana.
5. Place the pork chops on a hot grill and cook for 15 minutes, turning once. Lower the heat to medium and add the bacon and bananas. Cook for another 10 minutes, turning the meat and bananas occasionally.
6. For added flavor, baste the pork chops with beer while they cook.
